rows.promotion_consequence: operated continuous assurance service remains unpromoted
rows.reason: W045 emits a runnable local harness and run queue manifest, but no recurring scheduler, daemon, service endpoint, or operated run queue.

rows.promotion_consequence: retained-history service and pack-grade replay governance remain unpromoted
rows.reason: W045 emits retained-history query rows and a local harness operation, but no operated retained-history service endpoint or retention lifecycle service.

rows.promotion_consequence: retained-witness lifecycle service, retention SLO enforcement, pack-grade replay, C5, and release-grade verification remain unpromoted
rows.reason: W045 carries retained-witness lifecycle rows and declares a retention SLO policy, but no lifecycle service or SLO enforcement exists.

rows.promotion_consequence: alert/quarantine dispatcher and mismatch quarantine service claims remain unpromoted
rows.reason: W045 evaluates alert/quarantine dispatch rules locally and records an external dispatcher contract, but no external dispatcher or quarantine service is operated.

rows.promotion_consequence: operated cross-engine differential service, independent diversity, mismatch quarantine, and Stage 2 service dependencies remain blocked
rows.reason: cross-engine evidence remains file-backed and does not run as an operated differential service.

rows.promotion_consequence: pack-grade replay, C5, and release-grade verification remain unpromoted
rows.reason: W045 retained-history, retained-witness, and harness rows are deterministic local artifacts, but no pack-grade replay governance service binds them into a program-grade retained-witness lifecycle.
